scripts.docs:dev: node scripts/fetch-sdk-version.mjs && node scripts/download-block-help.mjs && node scripts/generate-block-reference.mjs && vitepress dev
scripts.docs:build: node scripts/update-sdk-reference.mjs --strict && node scripts/download-block-help.mjs --strict && node scripts/generate-block-reference.mjs --strict && vitepress build
